CREATE TABLE test_table (a INT, b INT, c INT);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE a NOT BETWEEN b AND c;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE a NOT BETWEEN 2 AND 3;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE a NOT BETWEEN 5 AND 7;
SELECT a FROM test_table WHERE a NOT BETWEEN b AND c AND b < 5;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE a NOT BETWEEN 1 AND 9;
SELECT * FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table2 t2 ON t1.a NOT BETWEEN t2.d AND t2.d + 5;
SELECT a FROM (SELECT a, b, c FROM test_table) AS subquery WHERE a NOT BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(b) FROM test_table) AND (SELECT MAX(c) FROM test_table);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT a FROM test_table WHERE a > 10) AS subquery WHERE a NOT BETWEEN 1 AND 10;
